close_reason: Added :now option to Store.obtain_queue_lease/6, updated tests to use fixed timestamps
description:
## File
`apps/bedrock_job_queue/test/bedrock/job_queue/store_test.exs`

## Tests to Update

### 1. "fails when queue already leased" (lines 215-223)
The test creates a non-expired lease but relies on wall-clock time to determine it's not expired. After Expirable is updated, the Store functions may need :now passed through.

### 2. "succeeds after previous lease expires" (lines 226-238)
```elixir
# Current (uses struct manipulation)
expired = %{QueueLease.new("tenant_1", "holder1", 5000) | expires_at: System.system_time(:millisecond) - 1000}

# Should be
now = 10_000
expired = QueueLease.new("tenant_1", "holder1", duration_ms: 5000, now: 4_000)
# Then pass now: 10_000 to the store operation
```

## Note
This may require updating `Store.obtain_queue_lease/5` to accept a `:now` option if it checks lease expiration internally.
title: Update store_test.exs obtain_queue_lease tests
